items.checkin_comment: I agree with my previous review, nice easy drinking brew, possibly more pale than XPA but sessionable.

items.checkin_comment: Slight citrus nose and flavours, and alight citrus bitterness to finish, but really smooth and bloody tasty mates! Cheers!

items.badge_description: Ahh, the trusty pale ale; crisp, refreshing, and always a good choice in a bind. That's 450 different Pale Ales or American Pale Wheats. Try 5 more for Level 91.

We’re excited to unveil our annual badge in honor of International Women’s Day, shining a light on the amazing contributions of women and non-binary individuals within the craft beer scene and celebrating their creativity, passion, and dedication. Let’s raise our glasses to the pioneers who have forged a path for the next wave of female, femme-identifying, and non-binary brewers. Join the conversation on Instagram!
